subject: Fwd: Release Build Ready for QA Validation
body:
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: MADHAN KUMAR M <madhankumarbusiness@gmail.com>
Date: Tue, Mar 10, 2026, 12:27 AM
Subject: Release Build Ready for QA Validation
To: <madhumithak.it2022@citchennai.net>

Hi QA Team,

The release build v3.1.0 is now deployed in the QA environment. Please
start the verification process immediately.

Focus Areas:

   -
   Payment processing
   -
   Order creation
   -
   User account registration

This build is scheduled for production deployment tomorrow, so your quick
validation is appreciated.

Please report any blockers immediately.

Thanks,
Cramling

subject: Fwd: New Feature Ready for Testing
